response.justification: Candidate is a solid full-stack software craftsman with ~15 years of experience, but the role demands Director-level individual contributor caliber with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products/platforms. The resume shows only recent, peripheral exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling at re:cinq since April 2025), no advanced degree, no track record of cloud/AI strategy leadership, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping future-state cloud product direction at scale.
strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Community leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source platform (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale or recognized AI expertise
Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) is below the Principal/Director-level IC bar
No evidence of cloud/AI strategy advisory work with strategic customers or partners

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI platforms
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC expectation
